race.comment: NIGHT AGENT (5) strong first-up Maiden winner at Port Macquarie, then sent to Melbourne with a game tenth in the Inglis Sprint over 1200m at Flemington. Kept fresh and back to his right class from the low draw. Should assert his class here. CHESTIME (8) went under narrowly here there-back over the 1300m with the 58kg. Scored a well deserved victory at latest over 1250m at Gunnedah in weaker company. Maps well with the claim and has solid each way prospects. VIN SANTO (1) was only 2.5L off the winner first up. Fitter and step up to the distance that produced the lone career win. ROYALIFY (6) looks suited returning to a track where he won his only previous visit.
